response.step_by_step_log: I performed an OCR on the screen text during the song performance, which showed the title 'キメマスター!!' and 'Q-MHz'. I performed a search for the lyrics using the query 'キメマスター Q-MHz Japanese and English lyrics'. The search confirmed the song title as 'キメマスター' by 'バンドじゃないもん!' (Band Ja Naimon!) with lyrics and music by Q-MHz. I then mapped the performance to the 5th generation Hololive members.
response.global_summary: A video performance of the song "Kime Master!!" (キメマスター!!) by Hololive's 5th generation members (Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka, Momosuzu Nene) as part of their 5th Anniversary 3D Live. The video includes introductory dialogue followed by the performance.

scenes.description: Dialogue among the four VTubers, setting up the performance.
The four characters perform 'Kime Master!!'. Text on screen identifies the song and composer.
scenes.original_artist: バンドじゃないもん! (Band Ja Naimon!)
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive 5th Generation (Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka, Momosuzu Nene)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
キマッちゃってる！？
全速モードでよいしょっしょ
制限はね無視だよ
なんでもかんでもやっぱっぱ
全力がいいよね
笑顔ありキメ顔アリ
最強BIG BANG 狙っちゃえ未来！
チェストー！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
We're on a roll, aren't we!?
In full speed mode, let's go, let's go
Ignore the limits, you know
Anything and everything, you know
Full power is the best, right?
With smiles, with cool poses
Strongest BIG BANG, aim for the future!
CHESTO!
